rect.style: filter: none; fill: none; stroke-opacity: 0.5; stroke-width: 2px;
rect.title: top

rect.style: fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); filter: url("#spot-light-filter-0"); opacity: 0.5; mix-blend-mode: hard-light; stroke-width: 2px;
rect.title: front

rect.style: filter: none; pointer-events: auto; mix-blend-mode: hard-light; fill: none; opacity: 0.5; stroke-width: 2px;
rect.title: left

rect.style: pointer-events: auto; mix-blend-mode: hard-light; filter: none; fill: none; opacity: 0.5; stroke-width: 2px;
rect.title: right

rect.style: fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); filter: url("#inner-shadow-filter-0"); mix-blend-mode: darken; opacity: 0.67;
rect.title: back

rect.style: fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); mix-blend-mode: darken; opacity: 0.67; filter: url("#filter-1");
rect.title: front

rect.style: fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); mix-blend-mode: darken; opacity: 0.67; filter: url("#filter-2");
rect.title: left

rect.style: fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); mix-blend-mode: darken; opacity: 0.67; filter: url("#filter-3");
rect.title: right
